title: centaurea seridis
intro: Centaurea seridis, also known as the scabious or dusty miller, is a flowering plant belonging to the aster family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Centaurea seridis include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and aid in the treatment of wounds and skin conditions such as eczema. The herbal preparations of Centaurea seridis include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
